things.name: Mount Kilimanjaro Summit
things.description: Africa's highest peak at 5895m - climb the Marangu or Machame route to Uhuru Peak

things.name: Serengeti National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage savanna with the Great Migration of 1.5 million wildebeest

things.name: Ngorongoro Crater
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage volcanic crater with 25,000 animals including the Big Five

things.name: Chagga Village Tour
things.description: Visit a traditional Chagga village on the Kilimanjaro slopes with banana beer tasting

things.name: Arusha National Park
things.description: Small but spectacular park with flamingos, giraffes and views of Mt Meru

things.name: Tarangire National Park
things.description: Baobab-studded park with the highest density of elephants in Tanzania

things.name: Lake Manyara National Park
things.description: Tree-climbing lions, flamingos and hippos in a dramatic Great Rift Valley setting

things.name: Materuni Waterfall
things.description: Beautiful waterfall on the Kilimanjaro slopes with a coffee farm tour

things.name: Moshi Town Market
things.description: Bustling market town at the foot of Kilimanjaro - excellent starting point for treks

things.name: Zanzibar Island
things.description: Spice island with the UNESCO old Stone Town and idyllic beaches
